codeReview.summary: The scaffold delivers the intended standalone Next.js/React/TypeScript/Tailwind/Vitest foundation with pinned Node 22 support, repo-local workspace storage scaffolding, and validation evidence for install, typecheck, tests, build, and a manual browser smoke check. The scope is appropriate for a foundation feature and no review issue needs to remain attached to this feature.

summary: Pass. The repo scaffold establishes the required project foundation, scripts, local data directory structure, and initial app shell, and the handoff shows the expected validators and browser smoke check completed successfully for commit 14e3d2c.
